name: Can a Boy-Girl Friendship Survive?
original_name: 男女の友情は成立する？（いや、しないっ!!）
overview: Childhood BFFs Himari and Yu’s vow of friendship hits turbulence when Yu reunites with his first crush in high school. Himari, who’s never known the fuzzy warmth of a crush, now must confront her feelings. Their shared dreams and peaceful days as a twosome gardening club are tested in this tale of love, flowers, and growing pains!
